assertions.evidence: cargo test -p h7cad-native-dwg pending_ -- --test-threads=1: tests::build_pending_document_keeps_section_metadata, pending_document_preserves_section_directory_entries, and pending_document_section_accounting_matches_emitted_objects all passed; assertions verify PendingSection metadata/index-offset-size alignment and emitted object linkage.

cargo test -p h7cad-native-dwg pending_ -- --test-threads=1: pending_document_preserves_section_directory_entries, pending_document_uses_pending_graph_edge_case_fixtures, and pending_document_section_accounting_matches_emitted_objects passed; record_count values observed as [0,1,1,1,3,2] align with emitted objects for single-record and multi-record payloads.

cargo test -p h7cad-native-dwg pending_ -- --test-threads=1: pending_graph_fixture_payloads_cover_edge_cases passed, proving empty payload -> 0 records, delimiter-only payload fallback behavior, and ordered non-empty token extraction for alpha/beta/gamma and left/right fixtures.

cargo test -p h7cad-native-dwg dispatch_entry_points_follow_pending_object_kind -- --test-threads=1 passed; dispatch_entry_points_follow_pending_object_kind confirms PendingObjectKind::EntityRecord dispatches to DispatchTarget::Entity.

cargo test -p h7cad-native-dwg dispatch_entry_points_follow_pending_object_kind -- --test-threads=1 passed; summarize_object returned ParsedRecordSummary with target Entity, section_index 1, record_index 2, payload_size 5 exactly as asserted.

cargo test -p h7cad-native-dwg pending_ -- --test-threads=1: repeated_pending_graph_fixture_parse_is_stable passed and build_pending_document_keeps_section_metadata passed in the filtered unit suite, evidencing stable, repeatable pending object identity and ordering for identical input.

cargo test -p h7cad-native-dwg dispatch_entry_points_follow_pending_object_kind -- --test-threads=1 plus pending_ suite context: owner_handle remains externally visible on PendingObject under the synthetic null-owner baseline.

cargo test -p h7cad-native-dwg pending_ -- --test-threads=1: pending_document_section_accounting_matches_emitted_objects passed, explicitly asserting aggregate record-count equality between sections and emitted objects.

cargo test -p h7cad-native-dwg pending_ -- --test-threads=1: pending_object_section_mapping_covers_each_real_section and pending_document_section_accounting_matches_emitted_objects both passed, proving each object maps to an existing PendingSection and per-section counts equal record_count.

frictions.description: PowerShell Tee-Object promoted native stderr lines into RemoteException-style noise while cargo still exited 0 and logs were captured successfully.
frictions.resolution: Used exit code plus saved log files as source of truth and continued sequentially.

commands.observation: 1 filtered unit test and 7 read_headers.rs pending-graph tests passed: build_pending_document_keeps_section_metadata, dispatch_entry_points_follow_pending_object_kind, pending_document_preserves_section_directory_entries, pending_document_section_accounting_matches_emitted_objects, pending_document_uses_pending_graph_edge_case_fixtures, pending_graph_fixture_payloads_cover_edge_cases, pending_object_section_mapping_covers_each_real_section, repeated_pending_graph_fixture_parse_is_stable.
Focused dispatch and summary assertion passed; summarize_object exposed ParsedRecordSummary with target Entity, section_index 1, record_index 2, payload_size 5.
Compile surface passed. Observed non-blocking warning from h7cad-native-dxf: method read_i64_le is never used.
